title: Aga Khan Palace
tagline: Aga Khan Palace — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: The Aga Khan Palace was built by Sultan Muhammed Shah Aga Khan III in the city of Pune, India.
overview.description: The Aga Khan Palace was built by Sultan Muhammed Shah Aga Khan III in the city of Pune, India. The palace was an act of charity by the spiritual leader of the Nizari Ismaili Muslims, who wanted to help the poor in the neighbouring areas of Pune, who were drastically hit by famine by offering them work. The construction took place over 5 years and involved one hundred thousand people. It cost approximately 1.2 million rupees.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kalyani Nagar
topPlaces.description: Kalyani Nagar is an affluent, predominantly residential neighbourhood located in eastern Pune, India. It has a population of 25,272 according to the 2011 Census of India.

topPlaces.name: Kalyani Nagar metro station
topPlaces.description: Kalyani Nagar metro station, is the elevated eastern terminal metro station on the East - West corridor of the Aqua Line of Pune Metro in Pune, India. It is connected to Rainbow Bus Rapid Transit System.

topPlaces.name: Ramwadi metro station
topPlaces.description: Ramwadi is the elevated eastern terminal metro station on the East - West corridor of the Aqua Line of Pune Metro in Pune, India. It is connected to Rainbow Bus Rapid Transit System.

topPlaces.name: Vimannagar
topPlaces.description: Viman Nagar (Marathi: विमान नगर lit. Airport City) is a residential and retail neighborhood in the Eastern Metropolitan Corridor of Pune, regarded as one of the affluent regions in the city.

topPlaces.name: Yerawada
topPlaces.description: Yerawada is a neighbourhood of the city of Pune in the state of Maharashtra, India. Before that British Raj Yerawada was known as Yeraoda.

topPlaces.name: Yerwada metro station
topPlaces.description: Yerwada metro station is the elevated eastern terminal metro station on the East - West corridor of the Aqua Line of Pune Metro in Pune, India. It is connected to Rainbow Bus Rapid Transit System.

topPlaces.name: Yerawada Central Jail
topPlaces.description: Yerwada Central Jail is a noted high-security prison in Yerwada, Pune in Maharashtra. This is the largest prison in the state of Maharashtra, and also one of the largest prisons in South Asia, housing over 5,000 prisoners (2017) spread over various barracks and security zones, besides an open jail just outside its premises.

topPlaces.name: Fitzgerald Bridge, Pune
topPlaces.description: The Fitzgerald Bridge (also known as the Bund Garden Bridge) is an historic structure located in Pune, India. It was constructed in 1867 during the British India period.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Aga Khan Palace?
faq.a: The best time to visit Aga Khan Palace is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Aga Khan Palace?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (4 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (4 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Aga Khan Palace?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Aga Khan Palace at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Aga Khan Palace?
faq.a: Stays in Aga Khan Palace start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Aga Khan Palace?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kalyani Nagar, Kalyani Nagar metro station, Ramwadi metro station, Vimannagar, Yerawada.
